LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Assassins.descri: 對人類造成的傷害增加 50%
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Assassins.label: 刺客的
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Bloodied.descrip: 角色生命值越低，造成的傷害越大
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Bloodied.label: 血跡斑斑
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Enraging.label: 激怒
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Explosive.label: 炸藥
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Incendiary.label: 燃燒彈
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Instigating.desc: 如果目標生命值滿，則造成雙倍傷害
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Junkies.descript: 使用者每有一個成癮行為，傷害就會增加 15%
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Junkies.label: 癮君子的
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Kneecapper.descr: 20% 的幾率使目標的所有腿癱瘓。
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Kneecapper.label: 護膝
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Poisoners.descri: 目標中毒持續 10 秒（每秒 3 點中毒傷害）。
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Poisoners.label: 投毒者的
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Powerful.label: 強大的
LanguageData.FCP_VATSLegendaryEffect_Staggering.label: 令人震驚
